# Mosaic Climbing

> Indoor climbing gym in Loveland, Ohio (greater Cincinnati). Bouldering, top-rope, lead, auto-belay, fitness, and yoga. Walk in — no reservation needed. Founded March 2019.

## Location & contact

- Address: 9501 Union Cemetery Road, Loveland, OH 45140
- Phone: 513-781-4083
- Email: info@mosaicclimbing.com
- Hours: Mon–Fri 12pm–9pm, Sat 10am–8pm, Sun 11am–6pm
- Areas served: Cincinnati, Loveland, Mason, West Chester, Lebanon, Maineville, Montgomery, Symmes Township

## Services

- [Bouldering](https://www.mosaicclimbing.com/about#bouldering): Indoor bouldering walls with padded floors. No ropes, no harnesses, no partner required.
- [Top-rope, auto-belay & lead](https://www.mosaicclimbing.com/about#ropes): Roped climbing on tall walls. Top-rope needs a belay partner; auto-belays don't. Lead climbing for advanced climbers.
- [Fitness & yoga](https://www.mosaicclimbing.com/about#fitness): Independent fitness center plus a separate yoga studio. Treadmills, ellipticals, bikes, rowers, squat racks, kettlebells, plyo boxes, cable machines, TRX.

## Programs & instruction

- [Group events & parties](https://www.mosaicclimbing.com/booking): birthday parties, scout events, corporate retreats, custom workshops, staffed packages.
- [Youth programs](https://www.mosaicclimbing.com/booking#youth): birthday parties, youth workshops, private youth instruction.
- [Adult programs](https://www.mosaicclimbing.com/booking#adult): adult group events, programs, and private instruction.
- [Memberships](https://www.mosaicclimbing.com/membership): adult and youth memberships with full facility access.
- [Day pass / climb with us](https://www.mosaicclimbing.com/climb-with-us): walk-in day passes, gift cards, membership purchase.
- [Events calendar](https://www.mosaicclimbing.com/calendar): upcoming workshops, summer camps, member events. Full calendar at https://portal.mosaicclimbing.com/mos/n/calendar.

## Careers

- [All open roles](https://www.mosaicclimbing.com/careers)
- [Route Setter](https://www.mosaicclimbing.com/route-setter)
- [Youth Coach](https://www.mosaicclimbing.com/youth-coach)
- Applications: send a personal essay and résumé to nicole@mosaicclimbing.com
